zh.Porto Carreiro, Porto, Portugal: 葡萄牙波爾圖波爾圖 卡雷洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro於大約1180年出生在葡萄牙波爾圖波爾圖 卡雷洛時，她的父親D. Henrique Fernandes Magro de Toledo96歲，母親D. Ouruanna Reymão de Portocarreiro67歲。她和Paio Soares Romeu至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世在西班牙。

zh-hans.Porto Carreiro, Porto, Portugal: 葡萄牙波爾圖波爾圖 卡雷洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro于大约1180年出生在葡萄牙波爾圖波爾圖 卡雷洛时，她的父亲D. Henrique Fernandes Magro de Toledo96岁，母亲D. Ouruanna Reymão de Portocarreiro67岁。她和Paio Soares Romeu至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: Henriques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Fernando, Mario, Adolfo, Adriano, Americo, Augusto, Julio, Adelino.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Aderito, Afonso, Agostinho, Duarte, Henrique, Paulo.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name Henrique, Portuguese form of Henry .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Portuguese surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: English, French, Walloon, and West Indian (mainly Jamaica and Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements haim, heim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’, introduced to England by the Normans in the form Henri. During the Middle Ages this name became enormously popular in England and was borne by eight kings. Continental forms of the personal name were equally popular throughout Europe. In the period in which the majority of English surnames were formed, a common English vernacular form of the name was Harry, hence the surnames Harris (southern) and Harrison (northern). Official documents of the period normally used the Latinized form Henricus. In medieval times, English Henry absorbed an originally distinct Old English personal name that had hagan ‘hawthorn’ (compare Hain 2) as its first element, and there has also been confusion with Amery. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. German Heinrich , and also their derivatives, e.g. Swedish Henriksson (see Henrikson ). Compare Henri .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hInnéirghe ‘descendant of Innéirghe’, a byname based on éirghe ‘arising’.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Éinrí or Mac Einri, patronymics from the personal names Éinrí, Einri, Irish forms of Henry. It is also found as a variant of McEnery .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Portocarreiro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: probably a Castilianized form of a habitational name from Portocarreiro in Galicia, in A Coruña and Lugo provinces, composed of porto ‘port’ and carreiro ‘path’, denoting a port that enables the pass of the cars. In Spain, this surname is found in Santa Cruz de Tenerife; elsewhere it is most common in Peru and Colombia.

nameMeanings.name: Sancha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of Sasha, Russian pet form of Alexander and Alexandra .

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro was born about 1180, in Porto Carreiro, Porto, Portugal, her father, D. Henrique Fernandes Magro de Toledo, was 96 and her mother, D. Ouruanna Reymão de Portocarreiro, was 67. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Paio Soares Romeu. She died in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro est née environ 1180, à Porto Carreiro, Porto, Portugal, son père, D. Henrique Fernandes Magro de Toledo, avait 96 ans et sa mère, D. Ouruanna Reymão de Portocarreiro, avait 67 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Paio Soares Romeu. Elle est décédée à Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro um 1180 in Porto Carreiro, Porto, Portugal geboren wurde, war ihr Vater D. Henrique Fernandes Magro de Toledo 96 und ihre Mutter D. Ouruanna Reymão de Portocarreiro 67. Sie hatte mit Paio Soares Romeu mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro è nata il circa 1180 nel Porto Carreiro, Porto, Portogallo, sua padre, D. Henrique Fernandes Magro de Toledo, aveva 96 anni e sua madre, D. Ouruanna Reymão de Portocarreiro, aveva 67 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Paio Soares Romeu. Morì nel Spagna.

ja.Porto Carreiro, Porto, Portugal: ポルトガルポルトーポルトー カーレイロ
ja.Pereira, Braga, Portugal: ポルトガルブラガペレイラ
ja.lifeSummary: D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiroが約1180年にポルトガルポルトーポルトー カーレイロで生まれた時，父D. Henrique Fernandes Magro de Toledoは96歳，母D. Ouruanna Reymão de Portocarreiroは67歳であった。彼女はPaio Soares Romeuとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はスペインで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro(이)가 대략 1180년 포르투갈 포토 포토 카르이로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 D. Henrique Fernandes Magro de Toledo(은)는 96세였고, 그녀의 어머니 D. Ouruanna Reymão de Portocarreiro(은)는 67세였다. 그녀는 Paio Soares Romeu(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 스페인에서 사망했다.

historicEvents.title: Portugal
historicEvents.description: Portugal is one of the oldest nations in Europe having established its continental frontier as it is set today in 1297

pt.lifeSummary: Quando D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Porto Carreiro, Porto, Portugal, seu pai, D. Henrique Fernandes Magro de Toledo, tinha 96 anos e sua mãe, D. Ouruanna Reymão de Portocarreiro, tinha 67 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Paio Soares Romeu. Ela faleceu em Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro родилась около 1180 г. в местности порто карриро, порто, Португалия, её отцу по имени D. Henrique Fernandes Magro de Toledo было 96 лет, а матери, которую звали D. Ouruanna Reymão de Portocarreiro, 67. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Paio Soares Romeu. Она умерла в местности Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando D. Sancha Henriques de Portocarreiro nació aproximadamente 1180, en Porto Carreiro, Oporto, Portugal, su papá, D. Henrique Fernandes Magro de Toledo, tenía 96 años y su mamá, D. Ouruanna Reymão de Portocarreiro, tenía 67 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Paio Soares Romeu. Murió en España.
